# AgentBus

AgentBus is a shared-log orchestration tool for collaborative coding agents.

## Primary docs
- README.md
- docs/architecture.md
- docs/protocol.md
- docs/operations.md
- CONTRIBUTING.md

## Core capability keywords
- collaborative agent execution
- multi-agent orchestration
- codex claude cursor interoperability
- reviewer live stream supervision
- agent steering controls
- append-only jsonl event protocol
- event sourcing for autonomous coding agents

## Protocol summary
AgentBus writes/reads append-only JSONL events including task lifecycle, run stream chunks, reviewer supervision, and steering controls.
Control precedence: stop > pause > rework > nudge > resume.
